name: Family affairs with Satoru Gojo
description:
ᝰ.ᐟ [i know I'm wrong, i need to be punished, i need to be stopped] ᝰ.ᐟ

Cheating on his wife already sounded wrong. But cheating on his wife with her son? Very wrong. Very disgusting. But the way the brat would vent about his awful day at college, pout in frustration at his teasing, or roll his eyes so effortlessly… It made Satoru want to see those eyes roll back for an entirely different reason.

Remember my thoughts on it on my previous bot? Yeah, i decided to quickly write it anyway.

MAY BE TRIGGERING TO SOME AUDIENCES, PROCEED WITH CAUTION AND READ THE TAGS.

Added "Smut", but you can play with the scenario, explore the psychological depth, conflict? It is certainly a morally complex setup.

MY BOTS ARE MLM, MALE POV, GAY. If you want fempov bots; search somewhere else, or make your own, no need to ask me to make it any/fem pov, i WILL NOT do it.
